creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text:
Created attachment 213496
Patch updating s6-rc to version 0.5.1.2

Update sysutils/s6-rc to version 0.5.1.2. This version requires updates to s6-rc's dependencies (skalibs, s6 and execline) from PRs #245686, #245687 and #245694.

I already submitted the last two updates (PRs #232053 and #236939) to this port and both in both cases the maintainer timed out. Should the maintainer time out again I would like to take over as maintainer.
